response.step_by_step_log: Identified 'Cat Loving' (キャットラビング) and 'Hai Yorokonde' (はいよろこんで) via on-screen text. Performed searches: 'Cat Loving Kashii Moimi Japanese and English lyrics' and 'Hai Yorokonde Kocchi no Kento Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve the required lyrics. The video concludes with dialogue between Pavolia Reine and Hoshimachi Suisei.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Pavolia Reine, followed by a dialogue interval with Hoshimachi Suisei. The video starts with 'Cat Loving' (キャットラビング), transitions to 'Hai Yorokonde' (はいよろこんで) at 00:28, and concludes with an outro of banter.

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine performs 'Cat Loving' (キャットラビング). Title appears in the upper left corner.
scenes.song_title: Cat Loving (キャットラビング)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
痛いことは嫌いですが
君の手の平は嫌いじゃない
言葉は飴玉みたいに
甘く広がってココロ満たす
嗚呼全然分かってない
永遠に言う通り
完全にフェアじゃない（どこにいても）
嗚呼「なんで？」は聞いてない
もっともっとあの子みたいに
可愛くなれたら...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I don't like things that hurt but
I don't mind the palms of your hands
Your words are like candy balls
Spreading sweetly to fill my heart
Ah, you really don't understand
Just as I say forever
It's not completely fair (no matter where I am)
Ah, I'm not listening to "why?"
More and more, like that girl
If I can become cute...

scenes.description: Transition to 'Hai Yorokonde' (はいよろこで). Song title and credits (Lyrics/Music: Kocchi no Kento, GRP) appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
はいよろこんで
あなた方のため
はい謹んで
あなた方のために
差し伸びてきた手
さながら正義仕立て
嫌々で生き延びて
わからずに盾
「はい喜んで」
「出来ることなら出来るとこまで」
もう一歩を踏み出して
嫌なこと思い出して
奈落音を奏でろ
もう一歩を踏み出して
嫌なこと思い出して
鳴らせ君の3～6マス...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Yes, with pleasure.
I'll do it for you.
Yes, humbly.
I'll do it for you.
The hand that reaches out
While crafting justice
Surviving with hatred
Using ignorance as a shield
"Yes, I'm glad for you."
"If you can, I can do it."
Step by step in my memory
Let it be played
Step by step in my memory
Three to six mass...
